case_title: LYNDA BOYER VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LYNDA BOYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATIONSTR MORTGAGE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE*** NO SIGNATURE SERVED NOV-18-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC DBA MR COOPER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYER, LYNDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC DBA MR COOPER $137.88 PRINCIPAL, $57.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $195.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $27.50) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYER, LYNDA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC DBA MR COOPER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $137.88 FILED BY BOYER, LYNDA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC DBA MR COOPER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LYNDA BOYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE FILED PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOV-19-2021 IS DEFECTIVE. NO SIGNATURE, NO SUITE NUMBER LISTED. PLAINTFF IS PROVIDED A COPY OF AGENT OF SERVICE FROM THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATES' WEBSITE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE - JACKIE SMETANA) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYER, LYNDA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC DBA MR COOPER
